Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Free Worlds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Denon Javal takes odd jobs across the Free Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — The Iron Legion appears to be abandoning the Free Worlds.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — The Free Worlds are located on the fringes of civilized space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — The Advocates have significant control over the Free Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — The Free Worlds are a region from which video reports are received by the High Council.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Carturus is within the territory of the Free Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — The Scylon system is on the border of the Free Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The Free Worlds is a location the narrator intends to avoid until things calm down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — The Free Worlds is a location where the characters might encounter Starhammer again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Free Worlds is a region or political entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Free Worlds consist of planets like Murrok.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — The crew needs to leave the Free Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — The Free Worlds have no higher inter-system government.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Free Worlds hate the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Free Worlds are represented by battlegroups in the Advocates' force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The Free Worlds is one of the four corners of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — The Free Worlds is a group that populations in the Thevellian System would likely join.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — The Free Worlds contains uncharted planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — The core sectors of the Free Worlds are swarmed by red dots on a sector map.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — The planets closest to the Free Worlds are being targeted first.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — The crew members were making their way toward the Free Worlds.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The Free Worlds hate the crew of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Free Worlds contain a minor mechanical supply company.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — The Free Worlds are a region or group of worlds mentioned in relation to the Zenith Starship's destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Last Horizon attacked the Free Worlds.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
